languages.text: {n}К поясу блюстителя пристегнуто оружие, в котором вы без труда опознаете плазменный пистолет. Несмотря на дорогую отделку корпуса, пистолет явно боевой — его рукоять, украшенная именным вензелем "ИЗ", покрыта царапинами и потертостями, указывающими на частое использование. {/n}

{n}Strapped to the enforcer's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}К поясу блюстителя пристегнуто оружие, в котором вы без труда опознаете плазменный пистолет. Несмотря на дорогую отделку корпуса, пистолет явно боевой — его рукоять, украшенная именным вензелем "ИЗ", покрыта царапинами и потертостями, указывающими на частое использование. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Strapped to the warden's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}

{n}Strapped to the warden's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}

{n}Strapped to the warden's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}

languages.text: {n}En el cinturón del guardia hay un arma que reconoces rápidamente como una pistola de plasma. A pesar de su acabado caro, es claramente un instrumento de combate: la empuñadura, con las letras «IS» grabadas, está cubierta de rasguños, lo que indica un uso frecuente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Strapped to the enforcer's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En el cinturón del guardia hay un arma que reconoces rápidamente como una pistola de plasma. A pesar de su acabado caro, es claramente un instrumento de combate: la empuñadura, con las letras «IS» grabadas, está cubierta de rasguños, lo que indica un uso frecuente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你一眼就能认出，执法者腰间绑着的是一把等离子手枪。尽管涂装昂贵，但那显然是把实战武器——带有“IS”字母组合的握把上布满了划痕和擦伤，一看就是经常使用。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Strapped to the enforcer's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你一眼就能认出，执法者腰间绑着的是一把等离子手枪。尽管涂装昂贵，但那显然是把实战武器——带有“IS”字母组合的握把上布满了划痕和擦伤，一看就是经常使用。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sanglée à la ceinture du prévôt se trouve une arme que vous identifiez aussitôt comme étant un pistolet à plasma. Malgré ses finitions coûteuses, il s'agit sans doute possible d'une arme conçue pour le combat : la poignée, ornée du monogramme « IS », est couverte d'éraflures trahissant un usage fréquent.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Strapped to the enforcer's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sanglée à la ceinture du prévôt se trouve une arme que vous identifiez aussitôt comme étant un pistolet à plasma. Malgré ses finitions coûteuses, il s'agit sans doute possible d'une arme conçue pour le combat : la poignée, ornée du monogramme « IS », est couverte d'éraflures trahissant un usage fréquent.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İnfazcının kemerine bağlı silahın bir plazma tabancası olduğunu kolayca anlıyorsun. Pahalı kaplamasına rağmen bu silah açıkça bir çatışma silahı. Üzerinde "İS" monogramı bulunan kabzadaki çizikler ve aşınmalar, sık kullanıldığını gösteriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Strapped to the enforcer's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İnfazcının kemerine bağlı silahın bir plazma tabancası olduğunu kolayca anlıyorsun. Pahalı kaplamasına rağmen bu silah açıkça bir çatışma silahı. Üzerinde "İS" monogramı bulunan kabzadaki çizikler ve aşınmalar, sık kullanıldığını gösteriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Am Gürtel des Enforcers hängt eine Waffe, die unschwer als Plasmapistole zu erkennen ist. Trotz der teuren Lackierung handelt es sich eindeutig um eine Kampfwaffe ... der Griff mit den Initialen 'IS' ist mit Kratzern übersät, die für eine häufige Nutzung sprechen. {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Strapped to the enforcer's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Am Gürtel des Enforcers hängt eine Waffe, die unschwer als Plasmapistole zu erkennen ist. Trotz der teuren Lackierung handelt es sich eindeutig um eine Kampfwaffe ... der Griff mit den Initialen 'IS' ist mit Kratzern übersät, die für eine häufige Nutzung sprechen. {/n}

languages.text: {n}強制執行官のベルトには、プラズマピストルであることが容易にわかる武器が取り付けられている。高価な仕上げにもかかわらず、この銃は明らかに戦闘用である。ISの刻印が施されたグリップは、頻繁に使用されたことを示す傷や擦れ傷で覆われている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Strapped to the enforcer's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}強制執行官のベルトには、プラズマピストルであることが容易にわかる武器が取り付けられている。高価な仕上げにもかかわらず、この銃は明らかに戦闘用である。ISの刻印が施されたグリップは、頻繁に使用されたことを示す傷や擦れ傷で覆われている。{/n}
